observations: 3 queries returned zero Precision@5. 0 of these were hard queries with 5+ constraints, suggesting constraint combination complexity is a primary failure mode.
3 queries had CSR below 60%, indicating the compliance agent struggled with multi-constraint satisfaction on complex queries.

statistical_note: Results are based on 25 queries across 3 difficulty levels. Standard deviations are provided per metric. This is a proof-of-concept scale evaluation appropriate for an MSc thesis. Production evaluation would require a larger benchmark with expert annotation.
